Webmastery Links

Some resources to help you make the most out of your website!

Links marked with a "⭐" are personal favorites of mine.

Table of Contents
  • General Resources
  • CSS
  • Javascript
  • Fonts
  • Frameworks
    • Blogging Engines
    • Image Galleries
  • Accessibility
    • Evaluation Tools
  • Layouts & Templates
    • CSS Frameworks
  • Snippets
  • Web Directories

General Resources

  • Awesome Lists - Tech resource directory. Here are some awesome lists that are specifically relevant to basic web development:
    • Awesome HTML
    • Awesome CSS
    • Awesome JavaScript
    • Awesome PHP
    • Awesome Selfhosted
  • Comparison of Different Web Hosts
  • HTML Cheat Sheet
  • HTML for People - A more practical, people-oriented guide to HTML.
  • MDN Web Docs - Comprehensive, in-depth documentation for all things web development! (HTML, CSS, Javascript, HTTP, common web APIs).
  • W3Schools - The absolute best place to learn web development for beginners and its totally free! 100% recommend for anyone just getting started!

CSS

  • CSS Background Patterns
  • CSS Pixel Border Maker - Also includes a bunch of pre-made borders you can use.
  • Hover.css - CSS hover/focus effects.
  • How to Style Broken Images in CSS
  • Realtime Colors - Preview color palettes for your website.

Javascript

  • Indent.js - Indents your JavaScript for you.
  • The Modern JavaScript Tutorial
  • Moment.js - JavaScript library for parsing and formatting dates/times.
  • Vanilla JavaScript Repository - Lightweight Javascript that doesn't use JQuery or other external libraries.

Fonts

  • CSS 101: Fonts - A guide to styling and using custom fonts.
  • Google Webfont Helper - Resources to help you self-host google fonts.
  • System Font Stack - A guide to pre-installed system fonts.

Frameworks

Blogging Engines

  • Chyrp Lite
  • TinyBlog
  • Zonelets
    • Accessible Zonelets
    • Zoner - A static site generator for building Zonelets-style blogs.
    • ZoneRSS - A Zonelets-compatible RSS feed and posting tool.

Image Galleries

  • Kale's Static Accessible Gallery Generator
    • Accessible Eleventy Gallery
  • Melons Gallery Maker

Accessibility

  • A11Y Project Checklist
  • A11y Syntax Highlighting
  • Colorblind Web Page Simulator
  • How to Style Focus Outlines
  • Owly's Accessibility Tips
  • Randoma11y - Randomly generates color combinations with high color contrast.
  • WebAIM - My go-to source for web accessibility info. Here are some pages that I think are especially helpful:
    • Color Contrast Checker
    • Creating Screen Reader-Only Content
    • HTML Semantics and Accessibility Cheat Sheet
    • Implementing "Skip Navigation" Links

Evaluation Tools

These tools scan your page and automatically detect possible accessibility issues. These aren't foolproof, but can still be extremely helpful for finding problems you might not have ever noticed otherwise.

  • Axe DevTools - The wording on the official website would make you think you have to sign up or that it's only a free trial, but the full free version is still available for browsers:
    • For Chrome
    • For Firefox
    • For Edge
  • IBM accessibility checker
  • WAVE Web Accessibility Evaluation Tools

See also: Web Accessibility Evaluation Tools List

Layouts & Templates

  • Almostsweet's Layouts
  • Eggramen's CSS Test Pages
  • Kalechip's Layouts
  • Lilaclynx's Layouts
  • Neothemes
  • Beepbird's Templates
  • Sadgrl's Layouts
  • Templaterr
  • Tentacool's Layouts

CSS Frameworks

These aren't full layouts. These are stylesheets that have very few or no classes, and can be applied to any HTML file right out of the box.

  • Ground Floor
  • Lissom.CSS
  • Tufte.CSS
  • Water.CSS

Snippets

Bits and pieces of code that can be incorporated into larger projects.

  • Codemyui.com
  • Kalechip's Code Snippets
  • Phuoc.ng
  • Sadgrl's Code Snippets
  • Shadow's Theme Bits
  • W3 ARIA Design Patterns

Web Directories

Lists of websites that you can browse to find cool new sites, or join so that more people visit your site. This section also includes webrings, fanlistings, cliques, etc.

  • Ray's Webring List
  • Ray's Indie Web Directories
  • Webri.ng
  • Neocites sites tagged "webring"
  • My (not so good) web directory/webring list

Fanlistings

  • The Fanlistings Network
  • The Anime Fanlistings Network
  • The Movielistings Network
  • Alter Listings Network
  • Fans Fans Fans

Cliques

  • Cliqued!
  • Project CLIQUE
  • Tricky Fox Cliques

Web Graphics

Some of these sites contain fast/flashing GIFs. Please proceed with caution if you have photosensitivity.

88x31 Buttons

The classic gray buttons that you'll see on a lot of older sites.

  • 88x31 Database
  • 88by31.neocities.org
  • The 88x31 GIF Collection
  • Lucas's button collection
  • Hekate's button maker
  • Sadgrl's button maker

Blinkies

  • blinkies.cafe - A site that lets you make and share blinkies online!
  • How to make a blinkie in any image editor
  • How to add a crossfade effect to your blinkie

Smilies

  • Mazeguy Smilies
  • YourSmileys.org

Misc Graphics

  • 22,000 Animated GIFs
  • 86x15 Buttons
  • Animated Graphics Tutorial
  • Diabella Loves Cats - Animal graphics
  • Glitter-Graphics.com
  • Honeycomb Stamps
  • Pats Web Graphics
  • Userbox Generator
  • Web Badges
